geopolitical.query: (oil OR brent OR crude OR petroleum) (war OR conflict OR sanctions OR opec OR russia OR iran OR "middle east" OR supply)

Peter Schiff Warns Iran  Will Win This War  Without Ground Invasion , Calls It Trump  Greatest Foreign P
China Serukan Perang Iran Dihentikan , Desak Semua Pihak Berdialog
CIA Ratcliffe visits Cuba as US demands political change

formula: Previsión final = 60% histórico carburantes + 25% Brent + 10% EUR/USD + 5% riesgo geopolítico.
warning: Estimación orientativa. No es una recomendación financiera ni garantiza precios futuros.
